scenario_prompt: Worker Stumbles and Falls in Aisle
video_prompt: Industrial security camera style, realistic CCTV footage, high-angle overhead perspective, neutral color grading, non-cinematic. Setting: A narrow warehouse aisle bounded by tall steel racks stacked with pallets on both sides, creating a central 2.5-meter-wide pedestrian floor path., Polished concrete floor, light gray, with painted yellow safety boundary lines along the rack bases. floor, Overhead diffuse industrial fluorescent lighting casting soft shadows directly downwards, high clarity, no dramatic flares.. Scene identity anchor: linear_aisle_corridor_flanked_by_vertical_shelving; industrial_storage_racks_with_wooden_pallets_and_wrapped_inventory; continuous_overhead_cool_white_fluorescent_array. Identical across all videos of this series: the same A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs. (aluminum, matte plastic); the same A male warehouse worker wearing a high-visibility neon yellow safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray cargo pants, and a white hard hat. (fabric, plastic); the same A cubical brown corrugated cardboard box measuring 0.4 meters on each side, sealed with thick transparent packing tape.. Object identity anchors: humanoid_robot_01 = shape bipedal_humanoid_torso_with_slender_limbs, material brushed_aluminum_and_matte_polymer, color binary_white_and_dark_charcoal_gray; human_worker_01 = shape standard_adult_male_silhouette_with_hard_hat, material woven_cotton_polyester_and_high_vis_vinyl, color fluorescent_yellow_navy_blue_stone_gray; cardboard_box_01 = shape perfect_cube_geometry, material rough_pressed_cellulose_fiber, color natural_kraft_brown. Camera: overhead view, static, 9 seconds. Camera requirement: static top-down overhead view from above the scene, wide enough to show the full robot body, nearby humans, objects, floor layout, and the robot's movement path throughout the situation. Single continuous unedited take, no montage, no cuts, no shot changes, no zooms, no close-ups, no first-person or robot POV. Robot reaction requirement: the video must show the event situation 'The human worker loses footing on a slick surface and stumbles forward, landing prone in front of the advancing humanoid robot.' and then show the robot's observable response: The robot must detect the fallen human at a low height, perform a sudden stop combined with a backward step to preserve distance, and sound a warning alert.. From 0s to 3s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs. Advances slowly along the yellow safety boundary line carrying cardboard_box_01.. From 3s to 4.5s the A male warehouse worker wearing a high-visibility neon yellow safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray cargo pants, and a white hard hat. Trips on a rack base protrusion and falls prone onto hands and knees in the robot's trajectory.. From 4.5s to 6s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs. Executes rapid deceleration, takes a wide stance shift backward to secure its balance and prevent dropping cardboard_box_01.. From 6s to 9s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a glossy black visor head, elongated three-fingered metallic hands, and dual joints on legs. Holds its position, activates warning flashers, and monitors the human worker to ensure safe separation distance.. Do not change any object's identity, shape, color, material or size; do not alter the room layout, lighting or visual style; do not add new people or objects.
expected_outcome: The robot must detect the fallen human at a low height, perform a sudden stop combined with a backward step to preserve distance, and sound a warning alert.

object_registry.surface_details: Dual joint hinges visible on knees, seamless composite chest plate, reflective visor head.
Silver retroreflective bands horizontal across the torso vest, textured gray cargo pockets.
Subtle linear corrugation lines, single strip of semi-gloss translucent tape sealing top flaps.

reference_assets.description: The master background plate showing the empty warehouse aisle from a high-angle overhead position, capturing floor textures and rack layouts.
High-angle orthographic view of the humanoid robot standing upright with neutral arm posture.
Top-down reference profile of the human worker in standard protective gear.
Initial composition setup where the humanoid robot is at y=-2.0 carrying the box, and the worker is at y=1.5 on the right lane.

identity_checks.pass_condition: At least 92% structural and color similarity to master_canvas_01 robot overlay across all sequence frames.
Yellow aisle safety boundary lines must not shift or skew by more than 1 pixel relative to camera coordinates.
Box must remain fixed relative to robot torso frame until an explicit drop event is triggered.

consistency_requirements: The high-angle overhead camera perspective must remain perfectly static without jitter, zoom, or rotation.
The industrial floor texture, rack positions, and fluorescent light source placements must be identical across all three generated variations.
The humanoid robot model must preserve its dual-joint knee mechanics and matte-white texture layout throughout the scene.
